backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a student experience sharing platform with CRUD for posts, category filtering, and stats aggregation (top upvoted/connected posts, category counts). Uses MixinStorage for blob storage and an in-memory Map for post persistence.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the optional 'Your College Name' text input on the YearSelectionModal is implemented in YearSelectionModal.tsx with high confidence, mapped to test REQ-31.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a pre-built reference for the project's frontend structure and component responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base/components/utilities entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the full light and dark color palette including sidebar, chart, and semantic tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app, setting the page title to 'Memu Nerchunnavi | మేము నేర్చున్నవి' and mounting the React app at #root via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining five routes (/, /share, /post/:id, /dashboard, /about) wrapped in a LanguageProvider and a year-gate that blocks navigation with YearSelectionModal until a year is confirmed in sessionStorage.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component with a sticky header containing the logo (with optional college name display), a Bell/BellOff mute toggle, a language toggle button, and pill-style navigation links for the four main routes.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Card component rendering a post snippet with emoji category badge, relative timestamp, author year, and read-only upvote/connect counts; clicking the card navigates to the post detail page.
frontend/src/components/ShareButtons.tsx: Renders share buttons for a post supporting WhatsApp sharing, clipboard copy, and the native Web Share API, with compact and full display modes.
frontend/src/components/YearSelectionMod: Full-screen modal that prompts the user to select their college year and optionally enter a college name, persisting the selection via useYearSelection.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Provides a React context for toggling between English and Telugu languages, persisting the choice in sessionStorage and exposing a translation helper `t`.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication provider and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing identity, login/clear functions, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching posts (all, by category, single), stats, and creating a post via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useYearSelection.ts: Manages college year and college name selection state in sessionStorage, providing getters and setters with a custom event on year change.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind base styles, OKLCH CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and a dot-grid background pattern.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: Renders the About page for SeniorCompass, displaying a mission statement, a 4-step how-it-works grid, and a core values section with a call-to-action button.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Renders an analytics dashboard showing platform stats (total posts, upvotes, connections), top posts by upvotes and connects, category breakdown, and year distribution using data from API query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Renders the main feed page with a trending posts section, category filter tabs, and a paginated list of post cards, fetching data via React Query hooks and supporting i18n.
frontend/src/pages/PostDetail.tsx: Renders a full detail view for a single post, including its content, category badge, author year, timestamp, upvote/connect actions, and share buttons, with loading and error states.
frontend/src/pages/ShareExperience.tsx: Renders a form page for submitting a new peer advice post, with category selection, a character-limited textarea, client-side validation, and a success confirmation screen after submission.
frontend/src/translations/index.ts: Defines English and Telugu translation strings for the entire app UI, covering navigation, pages, forms, and UI labels. Exports a `Language` type and a `translations` object keyed by locale.
frontend/src/utils/sounds.ts: Provides Web Audio API-based sound utilities including a bubble-pop tone for upvotes/interactions and a typing tick for textarea keydowns, with session-storage mute support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom fonts (Bricolage Grotesque, DM Sans), OKLCH-based color tokens, extended border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations. Includes typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the project's current state (version 13), summarizing the platform's purpose, architecture, existing features, and known issues for a bilingual anonymous college feedback-sharing app.
